[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000100101 3
1 0111101111 8
2 0110110010 5
3 0101001001 4
4 0111110010 6
5 0011101111 7
6 0011111101 7
7 0000100101 3

01 10 0101111101 7
12 21 0111111011 8
23 32 0111111111 9
34 43 0011111111 8
45 54 0011111101 7 match 6
56 65 0111101111 8 match 1
67 76 0111101111 8 match 1
70 07 0111110110 7

02 20 0111110110 7
13 31 0111101111 8 match 1
24 42 0111111111 9
35 53 0011101111 7 match 5
46 64 0111111111 9
57 75 0011100111 6
60 06 0111111111 9
71 17 0111001111 7

03 30 0111111111 9
14 41 0111111101 8
25 52 0111110111 8
36 63 0111101111 8 match 1
47 74 0011111111 8
50 05 0101110101 6
61 16 0111101111 8 match 1
72 27 0111110110 7

04 40 0111111101 8
15 51 0101101101 6
26 62 0111111111 9
37 73 0011101111 7 match 5
